# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
- name: backup-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: ${project}-backups
    storageClass: STANDARD
    location: US
    cors:
    - origin: []
      method: []
      responseHeader: []
      maxAgeSeconds: 0
    logging:
      logBucket: ${project}-logs
    encryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: projects/${project}/locations/us/keyRings/backup-ring/cryptoKeys/backup-key
    iamPolicy:
      bindings:
      - role: roles/storage.objectViewer
        members:
        - serviceAccount:${project}@appspot.gserviceaccount.com
      - role: roles/storage.objectCreator
        members:
        - serviceAccount:${project}@appspot.gserviceaccount.com
    uniformBucketLevelAccess:
      enabled: true
    publicAccessPrevention: enforced
    labels:
      environment: production
      backup-type: application
      created-by: deployment-manager
- name: backup-logs
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: ${project}-logs
    storageClass: STANDARD
    location: US
    lifecycle:
      rule:
      - action:
          type: Delete
        condition:
          age: 30
    encryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: projects/${project}/locations/us/keyRings/backup-ring/cryptoKeys/backup-key
    uniformBucketLevelAccess:
      enabled: true
    publicAccessPrevention: enforced
